plugins.name: golden
plugins.description: AI skills for the golden CLI: run and test Postman v2.1 collections from the terminal and CI (with pretty/junit/json/tap reporters and exit codes a pipeline can branch on), author and debug pm.*/chai test scripts, fire a single request or turn one into a curl, import Postman/OpenAPI/curl/folder sources, and auto-generate per-service collections (REST + GraphQL, status-check or full) across a corgi-compose.yml / multi-repo workspace — all in the git-synced collections/ format shared with the Golden Retriever VS Code extension.
